sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n52763" key="kalli/xeir" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καλλί-χειρ</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">Χειρος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen></foreign>, <sense id="n52763.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">with beautiful hands</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">ὠλέναι</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0328.tlg001:14:7" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Chaerem.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">14.7</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
